dialogueChunks.intro: It's over. You did what a dozen patrols couldn't.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You managed to {quest_action}. {target_npc} confirmed the kill and recovered the stolen {quest_item}. {quest_stakes} are secure again for the first time in weeks. Farmers are already returning to their outlying fields.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here is the bounty, in full. You've more than earned it.

playerResponses.text: The hunt is its own reward. But I'll take the bounty too.
Just doing what needed to be done.
Make sure it doesn't happen again. Strengthen your patrols.

dialogueChunks.intro: By the stars, {player_name}, you look like you went through a warzone. Are you alright?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The hunters are saying {quest_threat} was the most dangerous mark they've ever seen tracks from. The fact that you're standing here means you managed to {quest_action} through skill alone. The {enemy_type} are scattered and their leader is finished. {target_npc} pulled the last of the stolen goods from the wreckage.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your bounty, plus a little extra for the scars. Rest up: you've earned it more than anyone I've ever met.

playerResponses.text: It was close. Closer than I'd like to admit.
Skill, not luck. Remember that next time.
I need a stiff drink and a long sleep. Thanks for the pay.

dialogueChunks.intro: Good work, {player_name}. The primary target is down. But I want to be honest with you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We managed to {quest_action}, but a few of the {enemy_type} scattered into the wilds when you hit their camp. {target_npc} is tracking two groups heading in opposite directions. For now, {quest_stakes} are secure: they won't regroup without their commander.
dialogueChunks.outro: That's a problem for another day. Today you've earned this reward and the gratitude of every soul in the settlement.

playerResponses.text: If they come back, you know where to find me.
You should run those stragglers down before they regroup.
One problem at a time. Pay me and I'll be on my way.

dialogueChunks.intro: The hunt is over, {player_name}. Finally over.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} is eliminated, the stolen {quest_item} is recovered, and {target_npc} has already begun returning goods to the families who lost them. You managed to {quest_action} with the kind of precision I've rarely seen. {quest_stakes} are restored.
dialogueChunks.outro: Full payment, plus a commendation I'll be sending to every settlement in the region. Your reputation just went through the roof.

playerResponses.text: The trail always leads somewhere. You just have to be patient.
Reputation is nice, but the coin is nicer. Thanks.

dialogueChunks.intro: You look exhausted, {player_name}. And I mean that as the highest compliment I can give.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: That chase pushed you to your limit and you didn't flinch. {target_npc} heard the final battle from half a league away and said it sounded like a thunderstorm. But the stolen {quest_item} is secured, {quest_threat} is neutralized, and {quest_stakes} are safe tonight for the first time in weeks.
dialogueChunks.outro: Rest first. Then collect your bounty. You've earned both.

playerResponses.text: Rest sounds good right about now. I'll take that bounty, too.
It was a good hunt. The kind that reminds you why you do this work.

dialogueChunks.intro: Well. That was grimmer than either of us expected, wasn't it?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You managed to {quest_action}, but the things you found in their hideout... {target_npc} is still cataloguing the stolen {quest_item} and personal effects from a dozen victims. This wasn't just theft or territory: this was something cruel and deliberate. You stopped {quest_threat}, {player_name}. Whatever was driving them, it ends with you standing here and them not.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take your payment. And if the nightmares come, know that {quest_stakes} are secure tonight because of what you did.

playerResponses.text: Some hunts leave marks. This is one of them.
The important thing is it's over. That's all that matters.

dialogueChunks.intro: Report from {target_npc} just came in. All clear on every front. You did it, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Every last {enemy_type} is either dead or scattered so far into the wilderness they'll never trouble us again. The {quest_item} has been recovered and returned. {quest_stakes} are restored. {target_npc} is recommending we name the ridge after you, and I'm not going to argue.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your bounty, in full. And an open invitation: any time you need a roof, a meal, or a friend, you'll find all three here.

playerResponses.text: A ridge with my name? I'd settle for a warm bed tonight.
Keep the ridge. The bounty and the open door are more than enough.

dialogueChunks.intro: One last thing before we close the book on this, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I want you to know that {target_npc} and I debated whether to send you after this target at all. The odds were against you from the start: hostile terrain, {quest_threat}, and a trail that went cold twice. Most people would have given up after the first dead end. You didn't. You managed to {quest_action}, and {quest_stakes} are safe because of it.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is everything we promised, and then some. Walk tall, {player_name}. You've earned it.

playerResponses.text: I don't give up on a trail. It's not in my nature.
Debated whether to send me? Good thing you made the right call.
